problem: How many different counting numbers will each leave a remainder of 5 when divided into 47?

classified_questions.question: What does it mean for a number to leave a remainder of 5 when divided into 47?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: Can you identify the conditions that a number must satisfy to leave a remainder of 5 when divided into 47?
classified_questions.label: f

classified_questions.question: How can you determine the divisors of 47 - 5 (or 42)?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Why must the divisor be greater than 5 in this scenario?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Can you list all the divisors of 42 and identify which ones are greater than 5?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: How can you count the number of divisors that satisfy both conditions and find the answer to the problem?
classified_questions.label: b
